case_title: BARBARA ANN BERWICK VS. TRIDENT SOCIETY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BARBARA ANN BERWICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TRIDENT SOCIETY, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT TRIDENT SOCIETY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $135.00 FILED BY BERWICK, BARBARA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT TRIDENT SOCIETY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRIDENT SOCIETY, INC. DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IN MAILING UNSOLICITED MARKETING MATERIALS TO PLAINTFF DOES NOT CONSTITUTE NEGLIGENCE OR HARASSMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRIDENT SOCIETY, INC.
